## Referenced In

- [Markup definition](/reference/schemas/markup-definition)
- [test](/reference/schemas/test)
- [Resolved context](/reference/schemas/resolved-context)

## Fields

Field | Type | Description | Default
:-- | :-- | :-- | :--
record | one of:<br/>- string<br/>- object([Record (detailed)](/reference/schemas/record-detailed))<br/>- boolean | Required. Start recording. Must be followed by a `stopRecord` step. The `browser` engine captures the Chrome viewport (works under concurrency); the `ffmpeg` engine captures the screen and supports any application. Supported extensions: [ '.mp4', '.webm', '.gif' ] | 

## Examples

```json
{
  "record": true
}
```

```json
{
  "record": "results.mp4"
}
```

```json
{
  "record": {
    "path": "results.mp4",
    "directory": "static/media",
    "overwrite": "true"
  }
}
```

```json
{
  "record": {
    "path": "results.mp4",
    "engine": "ffmpeg"
  }
}
```

```json
{
  "record": {
    "path": "results.mp4",
    "engine": {
      "name": "ffmpeg",
      "target": "window",
      "fps": 60
    }
  }
}
```
